label: 拓扑切区
description: 用 topology 把 region 切成若干互不连通的子区域。先 region 减去 topology 得到内部，再 4-邻接 BFS 染色。可选 absorb=true 把 topology 中可被「相邻分量吸收」的格反向回归到分量里（用于让门洞这类切口在最终分块中仍归属相邻房间）。
description-en: Splits a region into 4-connected components by subtracting the topology cuts, then optionally re-absorbs topology cells into neighboring components. With absorb=true, each topology cell adjacent (4-neighbors) to a partition cell is added back to that partition cell — useful for door cuts that should still belong visually to the rooms they connect.
icon: 深色背景上一张大的方形区域被几条细线切成几个互不相连的色块，每个色块下方延伸出一行表示分块列表，扁平插画风格，简洁小图标，主色2种。

inputs.name: region
inputs.label: 输入区域
inputs.description: 要被切分的 0/1 区域 grid。

inputs.name: topology
inputs.label: 切割拓扑
inputs.description: 用作切口的 0/1 拓扑（墙、轨道、河流等），与 region 同形状。
inputs.description-en: 0/1 topology used as cuts (walls, tracks, rivers); same shape as region.

inputs.name: absorb
inputs.label: 反吸收拓扑
inputs.description: true：每个 topology 格按 4-邻接归入第一个相邻的分量，让分块覆盖被切口截断的格；false：纯切分，topology 格不归任何分量。
inputs.description-en: true: each topology cell is absorbed into the first 4-adjacent component, so partitions cover the cut cells. false: clean split, topology cells belong to no partition.

outputs.name: partition
outputs.label: 分块列表
outputs.description: 每个连通分量一张 0/1 grid。
